item.title: Setup Your Computer for CPAN-PRC
item.description: This blog is originally posted on perl.com, edited by David Farrell. Earlier I wrote about why should you join CPAN Pull Request Challenge. Now I will explain how to get your computer ready to work on your assignment. You can grab a Docker image and start hacking right away, or you can install everything you need on your computer. Option 1: The Docker Way By using a Docker image that has everything you need, you can start working in minutes.

item.title: Farewell to Google Code
item.description: A while ago, Google decided to shut down Google Code, which hosts over 200k projects. It is in read-only status as of now. You cannot update your code any more. No more wiki updates or issues, it’s gone. But, you can still reach the repositories and all pages, that’s what they mean by read only. It is also noted that Google is not going to delete your data, just move it to “Google Code Archive”.
